reasoning: Koren, this session directly targets your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, which have shown up in your power decline over extended efforts. Building these will directly improve your performance on climbs like the Alpine Loop. Your recent ride was an easy effort, so you're fresh enough to tackle these challenging adaptations.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6x(5min blocks): 3min at 201W-218W followed by 2min at 242W-256W. This pattern helps your body clear lactate efficiently while simulating the demands of Emigration Canyon.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
